title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 11: Let It Be, Leave It Alone
description: Chapter 11 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 11 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: I have heard of letting the world be, of leaving it alone. I have never heard of governing the world. You let it be for fear of corrupting the inborn nature of the world. You leave it alone for fear of distracting the virtue of the world.
